Case# CWErr.cwInvalidAuthenticationSequenceNumberErr

macOS 10.6+

```
case cwInvalidAuthenticationSequenceNumberErr
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/corewlan/cwerr/cwinvalidauthenticationsequencenumbererr#Discussion)

Authentication frame received with an authentication sequence number out of expected sequence.
